summary: 锁定闸门未通过：information_gain: missing new information；plot_progress: missing plot progress；character_decision: missing decision or behavior shift；state_transition_evidence: missing chapter/artifact/revelation state change evidence；required_information_gain: missing: 补充至少一个新的具体信息，优先落在物件状态、关系变化、风险条件或行动边界上。；decision_requirement: missing required decision landing；chapter_state_alignment: 物件“红绳”当前所在位置应为“状态待确认”，但正文写法与现有 artifact_state 不一致。；物件“平安符”当前所在位置应为“状态待确认”，但正文写法与现有 artifact_state 不一致。

issues.message: 锁定闸门未通过：information_gain: missing new information；plot_progress: missing plot progress；character_decision: missing decision or behavior shift；state_transition_evidence: missing chapter/artifact/revelation state change evidence；required_information_gain: missing: 补充至少一个新的具体信息，优先落在物件状态、关系变化、风险条件或行动边界上。；decision_requirement: missing required decision landing；chapter_state_alignment: 物件“红绳”当前所在位置应为“状态待确认”，但正文写法与现有 artifact_state 不一致。；物件“平安符”当前所在位置应为“状态待确认”，但正文写法与现有 artifact_state 不一致。
在 artifact_state 中，红绳、平安符、铜钱的位置仍为‘状态待确认’，但 scene 中明确描述孟浮灯将它们移至侧腰暗袋，应更新状态以保持一致。

strengths: 草稿整体方向可用，问题主要集中在局部完成度。
